signature.instructions: Examine the supplied passage and determine whether it is more likely to have been generated by an AI or written by a human. Base the decision on the passage’s overall linguistic patterns, such as formulaic structure, repetition, unusually uniform tone, generic phrasing, coherence, specificity, and natural variation. Do not treat any single feature as conclusive. Return exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`, followed by a brief explanation citing the strongest textual evidence.

fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
